title: Premium Artificial Grass in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR
metatitle: Artificial Grass Supplier in Gurgaon | Goals Floors
shortDescription: Looking for the best artificial grass in Gurgaon? Goals Floors is your top supplier for premium 25mm to 50mm artificial grass. 100% waterproof, zero-maintenance, and pet-friendly—perfect for apartment balconies, terrace gardens, and commercial landscaping across Delhi NCR at wholesale prices.
longDescription: Goals Floors is the leading artificial grass supplier in Gurgaon, providing premium synthetic turf for balconies, terrace gardens, and commercial landscaping across Delhi NCR. Engineered to withstand extreme Indian summers and heavy monsoons, our artificial grass requires zero watering, zero mowing, and stays lush green all year round. Available in 25mm, 35mm, 40mm, and luxury 50mm thickness, our turf is 100% waterproof, UV-protected, and highly pet-friendly. Whether you need an instant green upgrade for a compact high-rise balcony or a massive outdoor lawn for a corporate space, we offer wholesale prices and fast delivery. Transform your spaces permanently with durable, natural-looking grass that solves the hassle of natural lawn maintenance.

features.title: Advanced UV Stabilization Technology
features.description: Engineered with a protective, high-grade UV coating that prevents the grass yarn from fading, discoloration, or becoming brittle even under harsh, direct Indian sunlight.

features.title: Hyper-Realistic 4-Tone Micro-Yarn
features.description: Expertly crafted combining emerald green, olive green, and a brown curled thatch layer to perfectly mimic the exact look, texture, and bounce of a natural, healthy lawn.

features.title: Max-Drain High-Flow System
features.description: The robust double-layered polyurethane backing features precision-punched drainage holes, ensuring heavy rainwater washes away instantly without pooling or causing dampness.

features.title: 100% Pet & Child Safe Materials
features.description: Manufactured from non-toxic, lead-free, and hypoallergenic polyethylene. It provides a soft, safe play area for kids and is exceptionally easy to clean and sanitize after pets.

features.title: Zero Maintenance & Eco-Friendly
features.description: Eliminate the need for harmful pesticides, fertilizers, and daily watering. Conserve water and save thousands of rupees annually on maintenance while enjoying a pristine lawn all year round.

features.title: Heavy-Duty Commercial Durability
features.description: Boasting stitch densities up to 24,900/M2, our high-resilience turf is specifically built to withstand constant, heavy foot traffic in cafes, schools, event spaces, and public parks.

applications: Apartment Balconies & Terrace Gardens in Gurgaon
School Playgrounds & Safe Pet Play Areas
installation: Our artificial grass is designed for versatile installation across Gurugram's varied real estate. For hard surfaces like concrete or tiled apartment balconies, we secure the rolled turf using heavy-duty double-sided tape or premium synthetic grass adhesive. For outdoor soil and lawns, the ground is first leveled with crushed stone dust to ensure perfect water drainage during monsoons, and the turf is anchored firmly using galvanized steel U-pins along the perimeter.
maintenance: Enjoy lush greenery with absolutely zero watering or mowing. For indoor setups and balconies, a standard vacuum cleaner or stiff-bristled broom easily removes dust and dry leaves. For outdoor terrace gardens, a quick rinse with a garden hose washes away dirt. Our turf is 100% pet-friendly—solid waste is easy to pick up, and the area can be washed with mild soapy water to eliminate odors instantly.

faqs.question: What is the cost of artificial grass per square foot in India?
faqs.answer:
Artificial grass in India typically costs between ₹35 and ₹250 per square foot depending on quality, pile height, density, and UV protection.

• Budget artificial grass: ₹35–₹80 per sq. ft.
• Mid-range landscaping grass: ₹80–₹150 per sq. ft.
• Premium natural-look grass: ₹150–₹250+ per sq. ft.

Installation charges may be additional based on site preparation and project size.

faqs.question: Which type of artificial grass is best?
faqs.answer:
High-density UV-resistant artificial grass with a pile height of 25mm to 35mm is generally the best choice for most homes and commercial spaces.

• 20–25mm grass works well for balconies and decorative areas.
• 25–35mm grass is ideal for gardens and terraces.
• 35mm+ premium grass offers the most natural appearance.

In Gurugram and Delhi NCR, UV-resistant grass is particularly important because of intense summer heat and prolonged sun exposure.

faqs.question: How long does artificial grass last?
faqs.answer:
Quality artificial grass typically lasts between 8 and 15 years with proper installation and maintenance.

Its lifespan depends on foot traffic, sun exposure, drainage quality, and product grade. Premium landscaping grass generally maintains its appearance longer than budget alternatives.

faqs.question: Is artificial grass waterproof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, artificial grass is waterproof and designed to allow water to drain through perforations in its backing.

Most quality products handle rainwater efficiently when installed over a properly prepared base. This makes artificial grass suitable for terraces, balconies, gardens, and areas exposed to heavy monsoon rainfall.

faqs.question: Can weeds grow through artificial grass?
faqs.answer:
Yes, weeds can occasionally grow through artificial grass if proper weed barriers are not installed.

However, weed growth is significantly reduced compared to natural lawns. Installing a weed membrane and maintaining clean edges helps prevent most weed-related issues.

faqs.question: What are the negatives of artificial grass?
faqs.answer:
Artificial grass has some disadvantages despite its low maintenance requirements.

• It can become hot during direct summer sunlight.
• Initial installation costs are higher than natural grass.
• It does not provide the same cooling effect as living grass.

In Delhi NCR, surface temperatures can increase noticeably during peak summer afternoons, especially on uncovered terraces.

faqs.question: Is artificial grass cheaper than real grass?
faqs.answer:
Yes, artificial grass is usually cheaper than real grass over the long term because it eliminates recurring maintenance costs.

Natural lawns require watering, mowing, fertilizers, pest control, and regular upkeep. While artificial grass has a higher upfront cost, many property owners recover that investment through reduced maintenance expenses.

faqs.question: Can I install artificial grass myself?
faqs.answer:
Yes, you can install artificial grass yourself in small and simple areas such as balconies and indoor spaces.

However, larger outdoor projects require proper base preparation, drainage planning, seam joining, and edge finishing. Professional installation generally produces better durability and appearance.

faqs.question: Does artificial grass look cheap?
faqs.answer:
No, modern high-quality artificial grass can look remarkably similar to natural grass.

The final appearance depends on fiber density, pile height, color variation, and installation quality. Premium products often combine multiple shades of green and brown to create a realistic lawn effect.

faqs.question: How to calculate artificial grass?
faqs.answer:
Artificial grass is calculated by multiplying the length and width of the area to determine the total square footage.

Formula: Area = Length × Width.

For example, a space measuring 10 feet by 15 feet requires 150 square feet of artificial grass. For irregular layouts, it is advisable to add 5% to 10% extra material for cutting, fitting, and wastage.

installationSteps.title: Base Preparation
points: Clear all existing debris, stones, and weeds from the area
Create a perfectly level sub-base using compacted crushed stone dust (for soil)
Ensure a minimum 2% slope towards the outlet for optimal water drainage (for concrete/tiles)

installationSteps.title: Weed Barrier & Comfort Foam
points: Lay down a high-quality weed suppression geotextile fabric (for soil installations)
Install a layer of shock-absorbing comfort foam padding if a softer feel is required (for balconies)

installationSteps.title: Layout, Acclimation & Precision Trim
points: Roll out the artificial grass, ensuring the pile (blades) all face the same optimal viewing direction
Allow the turf to rest in the sun for 1-2 hours to uncrease and acclimate
Carefully trim the excess edges along the perimeter using a sharp utility knife

installationSteps.title: Seaming & Secure Fastening
points: Seamlessly join multiple rolls together using heavy-duty fiberglass seaming tape and specialized turf adhesive
Firmly secure the outer edges using galvanized steel U-pins (for soil) or perimeter glue (for hard surfaces)

installationSteps.title: Infill Application & Final Power Brushing
points: Evenly spread a calculated layer of fine silica sand infill to weigh down the turf and keep blades upright (optional for heavy traffic)
Use a stiff-bristled broom or a power brush machine against the grain to make all the grass fibers stand up perfectly straight
